# fish completion for ooxml
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a apply
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a agent
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a agent-triage
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a capabilities
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a completion
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a conformance
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a convert
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a diff
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a doctor
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a docx
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a find
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a help
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a inspect
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a mcp
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a pptx
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a repair
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a robot-docs
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a serve
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a template
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a validate
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a vba
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a verify
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a version
complete -c ooxml -n '__fish_use_subcommand' -a xlsx
